strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages — well beyond the 6+ year requirement
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Proven track record building internal tooling and developer infrastructure (GitLab/CI setup, MCP generators, custom CMS, test runners) — strong fit for internal automation tooling role
concerns: Resume emphasizes DLang and TypeScript; Kotlin is not listed in skills, though Java experience is present
Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned, though deep Node.js and TypeScript foundations transfer naturally
Vitest not named explicitly, but extensive TDD practice and testing framework authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrate equivalent depth

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React depth across multiple senior roles
Software craftsmanship and TDD expertise (workshops, OSS test tooling, trunk-based delivery)

response.justification: Bogdan brings well over a decade of senior full-stack delivery in the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with production experience at scale across fintech, martech, and high-throughput data platforms. His current role at re:cinq has him building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a direct match for the AI agent requirement that few candidates can claim. Combined with deep TDD discipline, proven internal-tooling instincts (CI/CD setup, custom test runners, dev frameworks), and broad polyglot range covering Java, his profile reads as a strong fit for a senior IC building internal automation tooling.
